purpose: Authoritative evaluation corpus for renderer speed and fidelity.

scenes.name: solid_surface_gallery
scenes.summary: Mixed geometry, grouped transforms, point lights, and projectors.

scenes.name: three_spheres
scenes.summary: Glass, diffuse, and emissive spheres with a bezier lens, arc, segment light, and diffuse walls.

scenes.name: crystal_field
scenes.summary: Dense refractive field of circles, ellipses, and arcs with spectral glass and a segment light.
